insights.title: Mixed price action, six items on alert
insights.text: 6 of 15 tracked materials moved more than ±3% week-on-week, with the portfolio averaging -1.7% WoW; Rapeseed Extraction (RSM) and DDGS drove the largest swings in opposite directions.

insights.title: Rapeseed Extraction spikes on tight supply
insights.text: Rapeseed Extraction (RSM) jumped 50.5% week-on-week to $406/MT, the sharpest rise in the portfolio, while DDGS fell 43.8% WoW to $162/MT, the biggest drop.

insights.title: China sourcing concentration remains high
insights.text: L-Methionine, Calcium Phosphate, L-Lysine, PH Raw Materials, L-Threonine, Amino Acid (Feed) and Feed Additive are all sourced primarily from China, with L-Lysine carrying a 48.96% cost premium versus India-origin alternatives.

insights.title: Five materials flagged high cost or under review
insights.text: Maize/Corn, Soyabean/SBM, Calcium Phosphate, L-Lysine and Limestone Powder all carry a HIGH COST signal versus alternative origins, while Animal Feed has no confirmed Akij sourcing country on file and needs supplier review.

insights.title: Rapeseed Extraction is the standout Strong Buy
insights.text: Rapeseed Extraction (RSM) is the only Strong Buy signal this cycle, sourced optimally from India at $264/MT with no cost gap versus the best available origin.
